title: At The Sideline Of Discuss On Consumer Satisfaction With Insurance & Pension Stakeholders
description: Left-Right: Odume Festus, Editorial / Project Director Financial Edge, Friday Ekeoba Managing Editor National Wire and Managing Editor, Business Today Communication Limited, Mrs Nkechi Naeche Esezobor
html: Left-Right: Odume Festus, Editorial / Project Director Financial Edge, Friday Ekeoba Managing Editor National Wire and Managing Editor, Business Today Communication Limited, Mrs Nkechi Naeche Esezobor, exchanging pleasantry at the 7th Annual Business Today Conference in Lagos.
